title: onoclea struthiopteris f. pubescens
intro: Onoclea struthiopteris f. pubescens is a variant of the Onoclea struthiopteris fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Onoclea struthiopteris f. pubescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in tea infusions, infusions in water, or as a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
